news.t: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
Simplify Adds to Its Growing Lineup of Fixed Income Solutions With the Launch of the Simplify National Muni Bond ETF (NMB)

overview.description: The Simplify National Muni Bond ETF (NMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that predominantly invests in investment grade, tax-exempt US municipal bonds while utilizing a multi-asset option spread writing strategy. The fund seeks to provide income, and secondarily, capital appreciation. NMB was launched on Sep 9, 2024 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify announced today that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across six Simplify ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Adds to Its Growing Lineup of Fixed Income Solutions With the Launch of the Simplify National Muni Bond ETF (NMB)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches NMB ETF, active fund combines three sources of potential return: muni bond coupons, active muni bond trading, option-writing income.
